current_upstream_head.subject: Remove ex-employee folders from fbcode/scripts
current_upstream_head.risk: Current main is not usable as a source checkout for this benchmark task.

paper.primary_title: Momentum Contrast for Unsupervised Visual Representation Learning
paper.related_title: Improved Baselines with Momentum Contrastive Learning

entrypoints.minimal_cpu_route: instantiate MoCo(torchvision.models.resnet50, dim=128, K=16, mlp=True) and run encoder_q on a synthetic tensor

install_notes: The repository has no packaging metadata; the gold route imports from the checked-out repo path rather than pip-installing the repo.
The README references older PyTorch ImageNet examples, multi-GPU DDP training, ImageNet directory structure, and public pretrained checkpoints.
The MoCo forward path uses torch.distributed all_gather and creates CUDA labels, so the CPU verifier exercises encoder_q directly.
The validated dependency route uses CPU torch==2.8.0 and torchvision==0.23.0 from the PyTorch CPU wheel index.
asset_notes: No ImageNet sample is required; verify.py generates a deterministic synthetic RGB tensor.
No pretrained checkpoint is required for L4; checkpoint download remains an optional full-task extension.
